item.title: Kia America, Inc.: POWER TRAIN:DRIVELINE:DRIVESHAFT Recall (2024 kia telluride)
item.summary: Kia America, Inc. (Kia) is recalling certain 2020-2024 Telluride vehicles. The intermediate shaft and right front driveshaft may not be fully engaged, which can result in vehicle roll away while in PARK.
item.affectedPeople: A vehicle roll away increases the risk of a crash or injury.
item.remedy: Owners are advised to manually engage the emergency parking brake prior to exiting the vehicle until the recall remedy is performed. Dealers will update the electronic parking brake software and replace any damaged intermediate shafts as necessary, free of charge. Owner notification letters were mailed May 15, 2024. Owners may contact Kia customer service at 1-800-333-4542. Kia's number for this recall is SC303.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
